titleStmt.title: SII 9.13: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 13. (A.R. No. 296 of 1905.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD WEST OF THE VILLAGE, BASINIKONDA, MADANAPALLE TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and not dated. It refers itself to the reign of the Vaidumba-Mahārāja Gaṇḍatriṇētra. It records the death of Maruvaka, sūramā®paḻi-Rakkasa Manujaradēva, son of Bālūchchoraṇi who was ruling over Sūramāṟaveḷi, in the attack made by Bāṇarasa and others on the Sōremaḍi fort against Noḻambi, Daḍiga, Rāchamalla and Maydāḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastyanēkasamarasaṁghaṭṭaṇōpalabbhajayalakṣmīsamāliṁgita
vakṣastalagaṇḍatriṇētra śrīvaiyduṁbamahārājar prithivīrājyaṁ
geye bālūccoraṇi sūramāṟaveḷi Āḷe Avara maga maṟuvaka
sūramā®paḷirakkasa manujarādēva cakrāṅkitasāhasa trisaratadavaḷi
ya mārajaruṁ bāṇarasaru mahārājaru sōremaḍi kōṭeyiḍe noḻaṁbi
daḍiga rācamalla maydāḍi guṇḍige vāgi barubaḷisi biḻdaḍe
poṟagōṭeyiṭṭaḻivalli palarā payaṇada maṟuvakasūramā
®paḍirakasa manujarādēvaniṟidu biḻda .
Digital edition of SII 9.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
